case_title: CINTAS CORPORATION VS. KRYOLAN CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CINTAS CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KRYLON CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY. THE MOTION WAS FILED AND SERVED BY MAIL ON DECEMBER 9, 2013. MOVING PARTY DID NOT ACCOUNT FOR FIVE ADDITIONAL CALENDAR DAYS FOR SERVICE BY MAIL PURSUANT TO CCP 1005(B). ADDITIONALLY, A DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED ON JAN-03-2014. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KRYLON CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Off calendar as untimely. The motion was filed and served by mail on December 9, 2013. Moving party did not account for five additional calendar days for service by mail pursuant to CCP 1005(b). ADDITIONALLY, A DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED ON JAN-03-2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
